---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
require(tidyverse)
require(RCurl)
require(readxl)

tmp <- tempfile()
for(st in 1:35)
{
  url <- sprintf('http://www.censusindia.gov.in/2011census/C-16/DDW-C16-STMT-MDDS-%02d00.XLSX',st)
  download.file(url, tmp, method='curl')
  lan1 <- read_excel(tmp, 1)
  lan1 <- lan1[-c(1:5),]
  names(lan1) <- c('Table', 'State_code', 'District_code', 'SubDistrict', 'Area', 'Mother_tongue', 'language', 'Total_P', 'Total_M', 'Total_F', 'Rural_P', 'Rural_M', 'Rural_F', 'Urban_P', 'Urban_M', 'Urban_F')
  if(st==1) lan2 <- lan1 else
    lan2 <- bind_rows(lan2, lan1)
  print(paste(st, Sys.time(), nrow(lan1), nrow(lan2)))
}
```
```{r}
load('india languages major and minor.RData')
load('india languages.RData')
```

```{r}

lan2 <- as.data.frame(lan2)
for(i in 8:ncol(lan2)) lan2[,i] <- as.numeric(lan2[,i])
lan2 <- as.tibble(lan2)
```

```{r}
lan2 %>% count(SubDistrict)
```

```{r}
lan2 <- lan2 %>% mutate(Major=(grepl('\\d+',language) & !grepl('Others', language)))

```

```{r}
head(lan2) %>% group_by(Area)
```
```{r}
langMajor <- lan2 %>%  filter(Major)
langMinor <- lan2 %>% filter(!Major)
```

```{r}
langMajor %>% filter(SubDistrict != '00000') %>% group_by(Area) %>% summarise(Total=sum(Total_P)) %>% arrange(-Total) %>% group_by(Area)
```

```{r}
areas <- langMajor %>% group_by(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, Area) %>% summarise(TotalUrban=sum(Urban_P), TotalRural=sum(Rural_P)) %>% ungroup()
```

```{r}
head(areas)
```

```{r}
areas %>% filter(TotalRural==0) %>% arrange(-TotalUrban) %>% distinct(TotalUrban, .keep_all=T) %>% group_by(TotalUrban)
```

```{r}
areas <- areas %>% left_join(areas %>% filter(SubDistrict=='00000') %>% select(District_code, TopArea=Area), by='District_code') %>% mutate(Area=ifelse(SubDistrict=='99999', TopArea, Area)) %>% select(-TopArea) %>% distinct()  %>% ungroup()
```

```{r}
cities <- areas %>% filter(TotalUrban>1e5 & TotalUrban/(TotalUrban+TotalRural) > 0.9) %>% arrange(-(TotalUrban)) %>% distinct(Area, .keep_all=T)
```

```{r}
cities <- cities %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% filter(District_code=='000') %>% select(State_code) %>% mutate(fullState=T)) %>% 
  filter(is.na(fullState) | District_code=='000') %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% filter(District_code!='000' & SubDistrict=='00000') %>% select(District_code) %>% mutate(fullDistrict=T)) %>% 
  filter(is.na(fullDistrict) | SubDistrict=='00000')
  
```

```{r} 
cities %>% arrange(State_code) %>% group_by(Area) %>% arrange(-TotalUrban)
```

```{r}
cities <- cities %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))
langMajor <- langMajor %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))
langMinor <- langMinor %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))

```

```{r}
cityLangMajor <- cities %>% 
  select(Area, Signature) %>% 
  left_join(langMajor %>% select(Signature, language, Urban_P), by='Signature') %>%
  group_by(Area, language) %>% 
  summarise(Total=sum(Urban_P)) %>% 
  arrange(Area, -Total) %>%
  mutate(language=gsub('[^A-Za-z]', '', language))


```

```{r}
head(cityLangMajor)
```

```{r}
cityLangMinor <- cities %>% 
  select(Area, Signature) %>% 
  left_join(langMinor %>% select(Signature, language, Urban_P), by='Signature') %>%
  group_by(Area, language) %>% 
  summarise(Total=sum(Urban_P)) %>% 
  arrange(Area, -Total) %>%
  mutate(language=gsub('[^A-Za-z]', '', language))


```

```{r}
head(cityLangMinor)
```

```{r}
cityDiversity <- cityLangMajor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total)) %>% 
  summarise(MajorHHI=sum(Share*Share), NumMajor=1/MajorHHI) %>% 
  left_join(
    cityLangMinor %>% 
      group_by(Area) %>% 
      mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total)) %>% 
      summarise(MinorHHI=sum(Share*Share), NumMinor=1/MinorHHI),
    by='Area'
  ) %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% select(Area, Population=TotalUrban)) %>%
  arrange(-NumMajor, -NumMinor) 
  
```

```{r}
cityDiversity
```

```{r}
cityLangMajorList <- cityLangMajor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  arrange(-Total) %>%
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total), cumulShare=cumsum(Share)) %>% 
  filter(cumulShare-Share <= 0.9) %>%
  mutate(Sign=paste(language, ': ', round(Share*100), '%', sep='')) %>%
  summarise(TopLang=paste(Sign, collapse=', '), Population=sum(Total)) %>%
  arrange(-Population)
```

```{r}
cityLangMinorList <- cityLangMinor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>%
  arrange(-Total) %>%
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total), cumulShare=cumsum(Share)) %>% 
  filter(cumulShare-Share <= 0.8) %>%
  mutate(Sign=paste(language, ': ', round(Share*100), '%', sep='')) %>%
  summarise(TopLang=paste(Sign, collapse=', '), Population=sum(Total)) %>%
  arrange(-Population)
```

```{r}
cityLangMajorList 
```

```{r}
cityLangMinorList
```

```{r}
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-NumMajor) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
  
```

```{r}
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-NumMinor) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
```

```{r}
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-Population) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
```

```{r}
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-Population) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Population, y=NumMajor, label=Area)) + geom_point() + geom_text()  + geom_smooth(method='lm')
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Cmd+Option+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Cmd+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).
